noteText: Customer enquired about eBilling enrolment. Guided through portal registration process.
Called customer regarding overdue balance RM125.40. Customer acknowledged and promised payment by 15 Mar.
Hardship application received. Customer is B40 household with documented income below RM2000/month. Approved for hardship programme.
Customer disputes meter reading for Nov 2025. Claims property was vacant during period. Field inspection requested.
Hardship renewal reviewed. Customer still meets B40 criteria. Extended hardship status for additional 6 months.
Account disconnected due to non-payment. Multiple attempts to contact customer unsuccessful. Notice posted to service address.
Disconnection executed. Customer contacted post-disconnection requesting reconnection. Advised to clear outstanding balance of RM3100.80.
AEON facilities management requested breakdown of consumption by meter for multi-zone billing. Referred to technical team.
Golf resort management committed to clearing balance via monthly instalments. Payment plan established - 6 months at RM750/month.
D Tempat Country Club account restricted due to persistent arrears. Legal notice issued. Management meeting scheduled.
FELDA Jempol requested tariff review for bulk industrial consumption. Forwarded to tariff department for assessment.
Government office requested consolidated billing statement for audit purposes. Generated and emailed to finance department.
Hospital maintenance department reported suspected meter malfunction. Meter inspection scheduled for next week.
Bengkel Wah Auto disputes high consumption reading. Claims business was partially closed during holiday period. Under investigation.
Customer agreed to payment plan for outstanding RM650.20. Monthly instalments of RM108.37 over 6 months approved.
Customer contacted regarding disconnection notice. Acknowledged debt but unable to pay in full. Advised on payment plan options.
eMandate payment successfully processed for Feb 2026 billing cycle. Auto-deduction confirmed by bank.
Hotel Seri Malaysia - second dunning notice issued. Contacted hotel management. Payment expected after quarter-end budget release.
USIM facilities department requested water consumption report for sustainability audit. Report generated covering 12-month period.
Perusahaan Makanan NS - partial payment received RM4000. Remaining RM3200.70 outstanding on Jan invoice. Follow-up scheduled.
